0x51841d9afe10fe55571bdb8f4af10604150035.description: The initiator of all transactions, providing initial liquidity, triggering the complex arbitrage, and ultimately benefiting from the attack by converting assets into SUSHI.

0xe11fc0b43ab98eb91e9836129d1ee7c3bc95df.description: A custom aggregation/router contract deployed or controlled by the attacker, used to execute the multi-step swap and liquidity removal in the main attack transaction.

0xf41e354eb138b328d56957b36b7f8148267087.description: The Digg/WETH liquidity pool created by the attacker with extremely low liquidity, potentially used to manipulate the price of DIGG during the attack.

0x9a13867048e01c663ce8ce2fe0cdae69ff9f35.description: The Digg/WBTC liquidity pool from which the attacker removed liquidity, obtaining large amounts of DIGG and WBTC that were later swapped for profit.

0xceff51756c56ceffca006cd410b03ffc46dd3a.description: The WBTC/WETH liquidity pool used by the attacker to swap WBTC for WETH during the attack.

0x795065dcc9f64b5614c407a6efdc400da6221f.description: The SUSHI/WETH liquidity pool used by the attacker to swap WETH for SUSHI, finalizing the profit conversion.

0x8798249c2e607446efb7ad49ec89dd1865ff42.description: The SushiSwap MasterChef contract where the final SUSHI tokens were sent, possibly for staking or later withdrawal by the attacker.

0xd9e1ce17f2641f24ae83637ab66a2cca9c378b.description: The SushiSwap router contract used by the attacker to execute swaps and liquidity operations; a standard DeFi component leveraged in the attack.

0x798d1be841a82a273720ce31c822c61a67a601.description: The DIGG token contract, the elastic supply token involved in the attack as a medium of exchange and manipulation.

0x2260fac5e5542a773aa44fbcfedf7c193bc2c5.description: The WBTC token contract, used as an intermediate asset during the attack swaps.

0xc02aaa39b223fe8d0a0e5c4f27ead9083c756c.description: The WETH token contract, used as the base trading pair and profit denomination in the attack.

0x6b3595068778dd592e39a122f4f5a5cf09c90f.description: The SUSHI token contract, the final profit token obtained by the attacker.

0xea674fdde714fd979de3edf0f56aa9716b898e.description: The miner address that received the gas fees from the first auxiliary transaction, with no active role in the attack.

0x5a0b54d5dc17e0aadc383d2db43b0a0d3e029c.description: The miner address that received the gas fees from the second and third transactions, with no active role in the attack.
